info.name: Smart Flood Warning API
info.description:
Postman collection for smart-flood-warning-and-monitoring-system (Spec §12).

Usage:
1. Set collection variables if needed (defaults target local docker compose via SSH tunnel: baseUrl=http://localhost:3530).
2. Citizen requests auto-fetch {{accessToken}} (hadiputra2 / kelompok2dev).
3. Admin-only requests auto-fetch {{adminAccessToken}} (dinasari1 / kelompok2dev).
4. IoT folder auto-fetches client_credentials token (Node-RED S1 flow).
5. Manual Auth requests remain available for debugging.
6. Folder per layanan: Citizen, Traffic/Environment, River CRUD, Analytics, ML, IoT.

exec: if (name === 'Gateway Health' || name === 'GET /metrics' || name === 'Reset all tokens') return true;
if (!token || expiresAt <= 0 || Date.now() >= expiresAt - skewMs) return false;
const { prefix, username, password, expectedGrant } = getAuthConfig();
throw new Error(`Auto OAuth failed for ${who} (${response.code}): ${response.text()}`);

body.raw: {"deskripsiLaporan":"Sensor banjir di gang 3 tidak akurat sejak kemarin malam."}
{"deskripsiLaporan":"Update laporan: kondisi sensor sudah dicek ulang warga setempat."}

item.name: Traffic & Environment (php-river)
item.description: Status real-time, riwayat, dan ingest pembacaan sensor (JWT).

item.name: River CRUD (php-river)
item.description: Zona, sungai, node sensor — write/delete membutuhkan role admin.

item.name: Analytics (php-analytics)
item.description: Analisis peringatan banjir (analytics_peringatan). Create otomatis via RabbitMQ anomaly.alert; pengguna Read-only; admin Read + Delete.

item.name: IoT (Node-RED ingress)
item.description: Uses client_credentials auto-auth (same flow as Node-RED S1). Collection pre-request is skipped for /iot/*; this folder fetches its own token.

exec: return Boolean(token) && expiresAt > 0 && Date.now() < expiresAt - skewMs;
throw new Error(`IoT auto OAuth failed (${response.code}): ${response.text()}`);
